desc:
# Agent Python Tools

- repo: oats
- repo_uri: https://github.com/district-solutions/open-agent-tools-coder.git

## File: oats/cli/tui/tui_utils.py

Prompts

```
['print the list of available tools with icons and descriptions to a rich console', 'print the active configuration including model, provider, hooks, and permissions to a rich console', 'fetch a URL and render the web page as formatted text in the terminal using lynx or httpx', 'use ThinkFilter to strip thinking blocks from streaming LLM deltas and show only actionable content', 'use StatusTracker to display an animated spinner with elapsed time and token count during LLM generation']
```

Usage

```
{'print_tools_to_console': 'print the list of available tools with icons and descriptions to a rich console', 'print_active_config': 'print the active configuration including model, provider, hooks, and permissions to a rich console', 'browse_url_in_terminal': 'fetch a URL and render the web page as formatted text in the terminal using lynx or httpx', 'filter_think_blocks_from_stream': 'use ThinkFilter to strip thinking blocks from streaming LLM deltas and show only actionable content', 'track_llm_generation_status': 'use StatusTracker to display an animated spinner with elapsed time and token count during LLM generation'}
```
name: oats/cli/tui/AGENT.python.tools.md

oats/cli/tui/tui_utils.py.print_tools_to_console: print the list of available tools with icons and descriptions to a rich console
oats/cli/tui/tui_utils.py.print_active_config: print the active configuration including model, provider, hooks, and permissions to a rich console
oats/cli/tui/tui_utils.py.browse_url_in_terminal: fetch a URL and render the web page as formatted text in the terminal using lynx or httpx
oats/cli/tui/tui_utils.py.filter_think_blocks_from_stream: use ThinkFilter to strip thinking blocks from streaming LLM deltas and show only actionable content
oats/cli/tui/tui_utils.py.track_llm_generation_status: use StatusTracker to display an animated spinner with elapsed time and token count during LLM generation
